answer:
符合条件的股票数量: 2
占创业板比例: 0.15%
what_changed: Fixed the data retrieval issue by requesting 500 days of historical data instead of 50, which allows filtering to the target date 2024-08-30. The previous attempt failed because it only requested 50 days which didn't go back far enough. Also corrected the date filtering logic to properly select data up to 2024-08-30 before calculating Bollinger Bands. The calculation correctly identifies only 2 stocks (300628 and 300849) with Bollinger Band width < 5%, representing 0.15% of the 1333 valid ChiNext stocks.
final_method: Used mootdx library to fetch 500 days of historical daily K-line data for all ChiNext stocks (codes starting with 300/301). Filtered data to 2024-08-30, calculated 20-day Bollinger Bands (middle=SMA, upper=middle+2*std, lower=middle-2*std), computed width=(upper-lower)/middle for the last trading day, and counted stocks with width < 5%. Out of 1397 ChiNext stocks, 1333 had sufficient data, and only 2 met the squeeze criteria.
